title: XP From Blocks
description: Convert your extra blocks into Bottles of Enchanting using the New XP table.
body:
This is a simple mod that adds an XP Table which is used to sacrafice precious Blocks into Bottles of Enchanting.

This mod currently supports 12 different Blocks including:

Coal, Quartz, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite, Amethyst, Emerald, Redstone, Lapis and Sea Lanterns

Depending on the rarity of the block, you'll be able to convert a single block into 1, 2, 3, 4, 16 or 64 bottles of Enchanting.

The recipe for the XP table can be seen in the Gallery.
